title: phlegmariurus squarrosus
intro: Phlegmariurus squarrosus, also known as the bushy forked polypody or forked polypody, is a species of epiphytic plant in the lycopodiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus squarrosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared by drying and decocting its leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal purposes.
